strategic_thesis.title: The "ANTI-SIGNAL" Opportunity
strategic_thesis.insight: Post-recovery verification revealed Hit Rate ~15% and negative FSS. A Hit Rate significantly below 50% (random walk) implies structural NEGATIVE BIAS, not random noise. The model is consistently misinterpreting the BEAR regime (LVI 0.1769).
strategic_thesis.hypothesis: If model says "Buy" and is consistently wrong, Alpha lies in "Sell". We trade the OPPOSITE.

action_2_1.title: The Mirror Protocol
action_2_1.description: Deployed shadow inversion layer with intercept_g2c_inversion daemon

action_2_2.title: Tagging
action_2_2.description: All inverse trades tagged STRATEGY_VARIANT: INVERSE_BEAR_V1

action_3_1.title: Retro-Casting
action_3_1.description: Created 39 retro-cast records from 37 post-restart forecasts (22 INCORRECT, 7 CORRECT, 10 PENDING)

interpretation.details: The inverse hit rate (38.64%) is LOWER than the original (44.00%). This indicates the model's error is NOT systematically in one direction - the model is genuinely unskilled, not just biased.
interpretation.model_behavior: Model is making random-walk predictions with no predictive edge. Both BUY and SELL predictions fail at similar rates.
interpretation.regime_misalignment: Current BEAR regime (LVI 0.1769) may not be reflected in recent training data. Models trained on BULL/NEUTRAL patterns perform poorly in BEAR.
interpretation.confidence_issue: Model confidence values (40-50%) show no correlation with prediction accuracy. High confidence on wrong predictions.

strategic_implications.negative_bias_opportunity: REJECTED - No exploitable negative bias found. Model errors are random, not directional.
strategic_implications.alpha_likelihood: LOW - Current evidence suggests no genuine alpha to capture.
strategic_implications.market_state: CHOPPY/SIDEWAYS - No clear directional edge for inverse strategy either.
strategic_implications.recommended_approach: Model recalibration with regime-specific training data, not simple inversion.

governance_actions.next_step: FINN review of model recalibration approach before any execution authorization

immediate: DO NOT authorize INVERSE_BEAR_V1 for live execution
Investigate why models trained on recent data show 15% hit rate
Review regime detection accuracy - BEAR regime may not be properly identified
short_term: Model recalibration with regime-specific training sets
Confidence calibration based on recent hit rates by regime
medium_term: Implement regime-aware model variants (separate models for BULL, BEAR, NEUTRAL)
Add regime transition triggers to model pipeline
Develop ensemble approach combining multiple regime-specialized models

financial_impact_simulation.scenario: If inverse strategy had been executed
financial_impact_simulation.expected_sharpe: NEGATIVE (38.64% win rate in trending market)
financial_impact_simulation.conclusion: Inverse strategy would have lost money in current market conditions

vega_compliance.action_taken: HARD_LOCK maintained, no shadow mode authorized

executive_summary.verdict: HYPOTHESIS REJECTED - No exploitable anti-signal bias found
executive_summary.finding: Model is genuinely unskilled (hit rate ~15%), not directionally biased. Inversion also fails (hit rate 38.64%).
executive_summary.action_required: Model recalibration, NOT execution strategy change
executive_summary.capital_impact: PREVENTED - No inverse execution authorized, HARD_LOCK maintained
executive_summary.next_owner: FINN - Model recalibration review and implementation

action_3_2_status: IN_PROGRESS - PnL simulation complete, awaiting T+30 full report
mantra: Eliminate Noise. Generate Signal. Move fast and verify things.
